assumptions: Sector coupling is isolated by comparing the full Level 2 matrix to the same config with sector couplings set to zero.
Bounds are evaluated on the finite protected complement.
Natural cutoff Lambda^2 = 0.07957747154594767 is used when lambda2 is omitted.
limitations: This is a finite-matrix operator-norm and relative-bound audit.
A finite-basis pass is not a proof of the full H_T theorem.
The zero-mode/complement decomposition remains finite-basis in this audit.

assumptions: The perturbation is represented by the finite Level 2 matrix.
limitations: Finite-matrix norm only; not an infinite-basis operator norm.
norm_bounds.name: spectral_norm

assumptions: The matrix entries are finite and explicitly represented.
limitations: Usually conservative; not a sharp spectral lower-bound certificate.
norm_bounds.name: frobenius_norm

assumptions: The finite matrix row sums bound perturbation size.
limitations: Row-sum bound is finite-basis and can overestimate |K|_2.
norm_bounds.name: row_sum_norm

assumptions: Finite complement base operator is positive with the stated lower bound.
The perturbation quadratic form is bounded by its finite spectral norm.
limitations: This is a finite-matrix relative-bound estimate.
It does not prove an infinite-basis relative bound for the complete H_T operator.
relative_bound.name: relative_bound_a_only

assumptions: Weyl lower bound is applied on the finite protected complement.
The sector-coupling perturbation norm is computed before residual comparison.
limitations: A finite-basis pass is not reported as an analytic theorem.
The full no-extra-light-state theorem remains open.
stability.name: weyl_sector_coupling_stability

correct_claim: BHSM v1.3B bounds the Level 2 sector-coupling block by operator-norm and relative-bound estimates. It does not prove the full H_T no-extra-light-state theorem.
limitations: Operator norms are finite-matrix estimates on the Level 2 complement.
The full analytic H_T spectrum and the full zero-mode complement proof remain open.
title: BHSM v1.3B Sector-Coupling Operator-Norm Audit
